title: Freedom of Information Act
description: Respond to FOIA requests within 20 working days for federal agencies.

title: FOIA Exemptions Application
description: Apply 9 FOIA exemptions correctly per OIP guidance.

title: FOIA Annual Report
description: File FOIA annual report per 5 USC 552(e).

title: FISMA Compliance

description: Conduct FISMA annual independent evaluation per 44 USC 3555.

title: StateRAMP Authorization
description: Maintain StateRAMP authorization for state/local cloud services.

description: Apply NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls for federal systems.

title: NIST 800-37 Risk Management Framework
description: Apply NIST RMF for federal information systems.

description: Comply with FAR clauses applicable to federal contracts.

description: Apply DFARS supplements for DoD contracts.

description: Verify suspension/debarment status per SAM.gov before award.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA

title: Section 508 Refresh

description: Comply with Executive Order 14028 cybersecurity requirements.

description: Comply with EO 14110 Safe Secure Trustworthy AI development.

description: Obtain written consent before collecting biometric identifiers in IL government.

title: DSAR Within One Month
